title: AgencyOpsReport
description: Schema for the AI-generated 90-day operational plan report

executive_summary.description: 3–5 sentence overview of the agency's current operational state. Sharp, specific, not generic. Reference their scores and named bottlenecks. Tone: direct and confident, like a trusted advisor.

maturity_label.description: Overall maturity label derived from overall_score

company_profile.description: Company context pulled directly from quiz answers — do not invent

category_summary.description: One entry per scoring category. All 7 must be present.

one_line_insight.description: One specific sentence about what this score means for this agency. Use their context. Not generic.

top_bottlenecks.description: The 3 most critical operational bottlenecks identified from scoring and answers

title.description: Short, punchy name for the bottleneck (max 8 words)

description.description: 2–3 sentences describing the bottleneck specifically for this agency

business_impact.description: One sentence on what this is costing them in revenue, time, or growth

priority_actions.description: 5–7 highest-priority actions across all categories. These are the things to start immediately.

action.description: Clear, specific action — verb-led, not vague

rationale.description: One sentence on why this is a priority for this agency specifically

day_30_plan.description: 3–5 concrete actions to complete in the first 30 days. Foundation building — quick wins and must-do fixes.

action.description: Specific, doable action — not vague goals

owner_role.description: Role responsible (e.g. Founder, Delivery Lead, Account Manager)

outcome.description: What will be measurably different at the end of 30 days

day_60_plan.description: 3–5 actions for days 31–60. Building on the foundation — systematising and delegating.

day_90_plan.description: 3–5 actions for days 61–90. Embedding and scaling — the agency should be running more independently by this point.

recommended_systems.description: 3–6 specific tool or system recommendations based on their current stack and weak categories. Only recommend what is clearly missing or broken based on their answers.

tool.description: Specific tool name (e.g. HubSpot, ClickUp, Make, Notion, Charlie HR)

purpose.description: What it solves for this agency specifically

why_now.description: One sentence on why this is the right time to implement it given their score

expected_impact.description: 4–6 specific, credible outcomes they can expect if they follow this plan. Tie each to a measurable area.

area.description: Business area (e.g. Founder hours, Delivery capacity, Revenue visibility)

improvement.description: Specific, credible improvement statement. Not vague. (e.g. 'Founder reclaims 8–12 hours per week within 60 days')

next_step_cta.description: The call-to-action at the bottom of the report. One clear next step. Always the strategy call.

body.description: 2–3 sentences. What happens on the call, what they'll get, why now.

urgency_note.description: Optional one-liner to create appropriate urgency without being pushy
